parameters.content:
## markdown-to-pdf

Markdown to Styled PDF

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes on self-hosted n8n, or add it directly on n8n Cloud with Verified Community Nodes enabled.

### Step 1: Generate PDF from Markdown
Resource: **Document Generation**

Configure the Document Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.documentJson:
{
  "header": {
    "height_in_pt": 40,
    "blocks": [
      {
        "type": "paragraph",
        "text": "My Company — Internal Document",
        "font_size_in_pt": 9,
        "color": "#999999",
        "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
        "margin_top_in_pt": 15
      }
    ]
  },
  "footer": {
    "height_in_pt": 40,
    "blocks": [
      {
        "type": "paragraph",
        "text": "Page {{page_number}} of {{total_pages}}",
        "font_size_in_pt": 9,
        "color": "#999999",
        "text_align": "center",
        "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
        "margin_right_in_pt": 50,
        "margin_top_in_pt": 10
      }
    ]
  },
  "pages": [
    {
      "width_in_pt": 595,
      "height_in_pt": 842,
      "blocks": [
        {
          "type": "paragraph",
          "markdown": "# Project Status Update",
          "font_size_in_pt": 28,
          "font_weight": "bold",
          "color": "#1a1a1a",
          "margin_top_in_pt": 60,
          "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
          "margin_right_in_pt": 50
        },
        {
          "type": "paragraph",
          "markdown": "## Executive Summary\n\nThis document provides an overview of the current project status, key milestones achieved, and upcoming deliverables for **Q1 2026**.\n\nAll teams are on track to meet their quarterly objectives.",
          "font_size_in_pt": 12,
          "color": "#333333",
          "line_height": 1.6,
          "margin_top_in_pt": 20,
          "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
          "margin_right_in_pt": 50
        },
        {
          "type": "paragraph",
          "markdown": "## Key Milestones\n\n- **Platform Launch**: Successfully deployed v2.0 to production\n- **User Onboarding**: Completed redesign of the onboarding flow\n- **API Integration**: Shipped new partner API with full documentation\n- **Performance**: Reduced p95 latency from 450ms to 120ms",
          "font_size_in_pt": 12,
          "color": "#333333",
          "line_height": 1.6,
          "margin_top_in_pt": 20,
          "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
          "margin_right_in_pt": 50
        },
        {
          "type": "paragraph",
          "markdown": "## Next Steps\n\n1. Finalize **billing migration** to new payment processor\n2. Launch *beta program* for enterprise customers\n3. Complete security audit and SOC 2 Type II certification\n4. Roll out automated monitoring dashboards",
          "font_size_in_pt": 12,
          "color": "#333333",
          "line_height": 1.6,
          "margin_top_in_pt": 20,
          "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
          "margin_right_in_pt": 50
        },
        {
          "type": "paragraph",
          "markdown": "---\n\n*Document generated automatically via Iteration Layer.*",
          "font_size_in_pt": 10,
          "color": "#999999",
          "margin_top_in_pt": 40,
          "margin_left_in_pt": 50,
          "margin_right_in_pt": 50
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
